title: PvPChaos
body:
# IMPORTANT

I have abandoned this as the code got a little messy and I can't fix it.

# Intro

This mod aims to shake up the PvP game, and make it a bit more exciting as well as interactive. This mod will be updated as time permits with:

Currently
  - New Weapons
  - New Totems

Possibly

  - New Enchantments
  - New Effects
  - New Potions

# Overview

This mod currently adds two weapons to the game, as well as two new Totems. 

The current Weapons:
- The Scythe is a faster but weaker weapon than the Vanilla Sword
- The Buster Sword is a slower but more powerful weapon than the Vanilla Axe
- The Masamune is even faster than the scythe at the cost of less damage

The current Materials:
- The Rotting Soul and a Netherite Template upgrades your Diamond tools or weapons into Rotting items.

The current Totems:
- The Totem of Silence adds another 20 hearts to your health for a minute and instantly heals you for around 16 hearts. The drawback is you get the Darkness effect for a minute as well
- The Totem of Fear makes you nearly invincible, as well as faster and stronger
- The Rotting Soul makes you nearly invincible as the Totem of Fear does, but also allows for you to see inn the dark and the mending of flesh and bones.

# Crafting

The crafting recipes are shown in the gallery
